! Title: US Politics — Tier 4
! Description: Filters US political and current-events noise
! Expires: 4 days
! Generated by scripts/generate.py — DO NOT EDIT.
! Edit words/us.yml, then: uv run python scripts/generate.py

! --- Reddit: Institutions — Government & Law ---
! Branches of government and legal entities
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:US)\b/)

! --- Reddit: Overzealous Words ---
! Words that _could_ trigger political speech
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(?:Historical)\b/i)
